questions.question: India signed agreement with which country, on infrastructure, financial services and sustainable finance?
questions.explanation: India has recently signed reached landmark agreements on financial services, infrastructure and sustainable finance.These were signed at the 10th Economic and Financial Dialogue (EFD) between the UK and India. It was jointly chaired by Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman and the UK Chancellor Rishi Sunak. This is expected to boost jobs and investments in both countries.

questions.question: Which body is set to submit its report to the Indian President on November 9?
questions.explanation: The 15th Finance Commission (FFC) has announced that it is set to submit its report to Indian President Ram Nath Kovind on 9 November, this year.The report will have recommendations for next five years beginning the financial year 2021-22. The report may be tabled in the Parliament along with action taken report by the government, during the next budget session.

questions.question: As per the Annual Status of Education Report (ASER) 2020, what percentage of surveyed children had access to live online classes?
questions.explanation: The Annual Status of Education Report (ASER) 2020 was recently released, by conducting a phone survey of 60,000-odd students across rural India.As per the report, only 11 per cent of the surveyed children had access to live online classes. Only one-third of the surveyed children had access to online learning. The report reveals the digital inequality prevalent in the country.

questions.question: Which organisation has launched Inflation Expectations Survey of Households (IESH)?
questions.explanation: The nation’s central bank Reserve Bank of India has launched the latest round of Inflation Expectations Survey of Households (IESH). The survey would give vital inputs to RBI for framing the monetary policy. The survey is conducted regularly in 13 cities namely Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Bhopal, Chennai, Delhi, Guwahati, Hyderabad, Jaipur, Kolkata, Lucknow, Mumbai, Patna and Thiruvananthapuram.

questions.question: Which Indian company has been announced as the title sponsor of Women’s T20 Challenge 2020?
questions.explanation: The Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI) has recently announced Jio as the title sponsor for the upcoming 2020 edition of the Women’s T20 Challenge.The partnership will also be supported by Reliance Foundation Education and Sports for All (RF ESA). This is the first time a sponsor has signed with BCCI exclusively for the women’s matches. Women’s T20 Challenge will be played from November 4-9 in Sharjah.

questions.question: Sanjeet, who won the Alexis Vastine tournament, is associated with which sports?
questions.explanation: Indian boxer Sanjeet won gold in the Alexis Vastine international boxing tournament in Nantes in 91 kg category. World silver-medallist Amit Panghal also won gold in 52 kg category.Ashish Kumar also won gold in the 75kg category opponent pulled out due to injury. Kavinder Singh Bisht won silver while India earned three bronze medals.

questions.question: The Mansar Lake Development Plan has been inaugurated in which state / UT?
questions.explanation: The Union Minister for Development of North Eastern Region Shri. Jitendra Singh has inaugurated the Mansar Lake Development Plan in Jammu and Kashmir.This has been done to increase the tourism sector in this region. The project aims at attracting 20 lakh tourists every year along with creation of employment for 1.15 crore man-days.

questions.question: The Typhoon named “Goni” has recently hit which country?
questions.explanation: A Super Typhoon name Goni, has hit the Philippines recently. This is considered to be the most powerful storms in the last four years and has resulted in huge catastrophic damage to the coastal Philippines. Philippines has been badly affected by two typhoons in October, by the COVID Pandemic and its resultant unemployment.

questions.question: IISc Bengaluru has signed a MoU with which organisation to develop biomass gasification-based hydrogen generation technology?
questions.explanation: Indian Institute of Science Bengaluru has entered into an MoU with R&D Centre of Indian Oil Corporation Ltd (IOCL). The partnership aims to develop biomass gasification-based hydrogen generation technology for producing fuel cell-grade hydrogen. The testing and development would take place in IOCL’s R&D Centre in Faridabad.

questions.question: The first foreign Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF), that was notified by the Finance Ministry, is associated with which country?
questions.explanation: Union Finance Ministry of India has recently announced that Abu Dhabi’s Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF) has become the first foreign SWF that has been notified.MIC Redwood 1 RSC Limited will get 100 per cent income tax exemption for the long-term investments to be made in specific priority sectors in India.
